# Code of Conduct

This repository is a customized team-maintained fork of upstream `new-api`.

We expect all contributors to collaborate in a respectful, constructive, and professional way.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful in code review, issues, and pull requests
- Focus feedback on the code, design, and implementation details
- Assume good intent and communicate clearly when disagreements happen
- Keep discussions relevant to the repository and current work
- Protect private information, credentials, and internal project details

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Personal attacks, insults, or harassment
- Discriminatory, abusive, or threatening language
- Publishing private information without permission
- Repeatedly derailing technical discussions
- Knowingly submitting misleading, malicious, or unsafe changes

## Scope

This code of conduct applies to pull requests, issues, code review, discussions, and other collaboration spaces for this repository.

## Reporting

If you need to report a serious conduct issue, contact:

- `support@quantumnous.com`

Repository maintainers may edit, remove, or reject content that is not aligned with this code of conduct.
